prompt: List all skills/categories available in this repository. Give me the complete list of all skill directories and files.
content:
# Complete Skill Directory from awesome-agent-skills

**OpenAI/Codex:** cloudflare-deploy, develop-web-game, doc, gh-address-comments, gh-fix-ci, imagegen, jupyter-notebook, linear, netlify-deploy, notion-knowledge-capture, pdf, playwright, sora, speech, spreadsheet, figma, figma-implement-design, frontend-skill

**Google Gemini:** gemini-api-dev, vertex-ai-api-dev, gemini-live-api-dev, gemini-interactions-api
